fields.title: [viewer-api][ticket-viewer] Introduce property-based graph node rendering tiers

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Rendering is selected from explicit property-based rules instead of a card-first default. 2. Minimal tiers switch by camera mode between flat points and shaded spheres. 3. Intermediate tiers use compact labels, icons, or tooltip previews without full HTML cards. 4. Hover raises a node by exactly one detail tier. 5. Full HTML rendering is reserved for high-detail tiers only.
fields.title: [viewer-api][ticket-viewer] Introduce property-based graph node rendering tiers

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Rendering is selected from explicit property-based rules instead of a card-first default. 2. The ordered tier ladder is point-or-sphere → icon → label → compact → full. 3. Minimal tiers switch by camera mode between flat points in 2D and shaded spheres in 3D. 4. Hover raises a node by exactly one detail tier. 5. Non-full tiers do not rely on an extra tooltip fallback when tier promotion is sufficient. 6. Full HTML rendering is reserved for high-detail tiers only. 7. Release Playwright coverage proves tier ordering, camera-mode-specific lowest tiers, and one-tier hover promotion.
